changes_made: Changed k8s_audit_logging_enabled to k8s_audit_logging_configured for consistency with naming conventions
review_notes: The functions mostly align with the NIST control CA-7(6) for continuous monitoring. The audit logging and configuration monitoring functions are relevant to Kubernetes. However, the function name 'k8s_audit_logging_enabled' was slightly adjusted to 'k8s_audit_logging_configured' to better reflect the configuration aspect and align with naming conventions.
naming_improvements: Consider using 'configured' instead of 'enabled' for audit logging to emphasize configuration completeness.
title: Continuous Monitoring - Continuous monitoring | automation support for monitoring ensure the accuracy, c
step1_reasoning: The control CA-7(6) focuses on continuous monitoring and automation support to ensure accuracy and completeness of monitoring. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring audit logging is enabled and properly configured to capture changes, including network policies and admission controller configurations. These elements are critical for monitoring changes within a Kubernetes environment.
